items.label: [Artemis] Check Recent Posts for Missing Flair
items.description: Check up to 100 recent posts for missing flair

items.label: [Artemis] Refresh Statistics Page
items.description: Record recent subreddit statistics and manually update the statistics wiki page

flair_enforcement_enabled.label: Enable Flair Enforcement
flair_enforcement_enabled.helpText: Enabling this option will allow Artemis to remind users about missing post flair and optionally, to remove unflaired posts.

statistics_updating_enabled.label: Enable Statistics Updating
statistics_updating_enabled.helpText: Allow Artemis to run daily and monthly statistics updates, including the manual statistics page refresh. When disabled, Artemis skips statistics collection and wiki updates.

userflair_gathering_enabled.label: Enable Userflair Gathering
userflair_gathering_enabled.helpText: Allow Artemis to gather user flair assignments during monthly statistics updates and manual statistics page refreshes. When disabled, Artemis clears stored user flair snapshots and skips user flair enumeration.

discord_webhook_url.label: Discord Webhook URL
discord_webhook_url.helpText: Discord webhook URL for optional Artemis alerts.

discord_alert_statistics_enabled.label: Send Discord Statistics Alerts
discord_alert_statistics_enabled.helpText: Send a Discord alert after a daily, monthly, or manual statistics update finishes. Requires a Discord webhook URL above.

discord_alert_flair_actions_enabled.label: Send Discord Flair Action Alerts
discord_alert_flair_actions_enabled.helpText: Send a Discord alert after Artemis sends a flair reminder, removes a post for flair rules, or approves a previously removed flaired post. Requires a Discord webhook URL above.

flair_enforce_remove_posts.label: Remove Unflaired Posts
flair_enforce_remove_posts.helpText: Only applies when flair enforcement is enabled. Remove posts that were not unflaired; when disabled, Artemis sends flair reminder messages without removing posts.

flair_enforce_moderators.label: Enforce Flair on Moderator Posts
flair_enforce_moderators.helpText: Apply flair enforcement settings to posts made by subreddit moderators. By default, Artemis will not enforce flair for moderators.

flair_enforce_approve_posts.label: Automatically Approve Flaired Posts
flair_enforce_approve_posts.helpText: Automatically approve posts that Artemis has previously removed once they receive a post flair. Only applies when unflaired post removal is enabled. Disabling this will mean that moderators must manually approve removed posts.

flair_enforce_custom_message.label: Custom Flair Reminder Message
flair_enforce_custom_message.helpText: Provide custom text to include in the bot's flair reminder messages. Text over 500 characters will be truncated. (optional)

custom_goodbye.label: Custom Goodbye
custom_goodbye.helpText: A short sign-off text used in flair reminder messages. Text over 20 characters are truncated. Lowercase is suggested. (optional)

flair_enforce_whitelist.label: Flair Enforcement Username Whitelist
flair_enforce_whitelist.helpText: Exclude these usernames from being subject to flair enforcement. Separate usernames with commas or new lines. Do not include u/. (optional)

flair_tag_nsfw.label: Auto-NSFW Flair Template IDs
flair_tag_nsfw.helpText: Post flair template IDs listed here will be automatically tagged as 'NSFW'. Separate IDs with commas or new lines. (optional)

flair_tag_spoiler.label: Auto-Spoiler Flair Template IDs
flair_tag_spoiler.helpText: Post flair template IDs listed here will be automatically tagged as 'spoiler'. Separate IDs with commas or new lines. (optional)

flair_schedule_rule_1_ids.label: Flair Schedule 1: Template IDs
flair_schedule_rule_1_ids.helpText: Optional. Artemis allows up to five groups of flairs to only be allowed on certain days. For example, a 'Memes' flair can be allowed only on Mondays, or a 'Self-Promotion' flair only on Sundays. Enter post flair template IDs for this schedule, separated with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_1_days.label: Flair Schedule 1: Allowed Days
flair_schedule_rule_1_days.helpText: Days when these flair templates are allowed.

flair_schedule_rule_2_ids.label: Flair Schedule 2: Template IDs
flair_schedule_rule_2_ids.helpText: Post flair template IDs for this schedule. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_2_days.label: Flair Schedule 2: Allowed Days
flair_schedule_rule_2_days.helpText: Days when these flair templates are allowed.

flair_schedule_rule_3_ids.label: Flair Schedule 3: Template IDs
flair_schedule_rule_3_ids.helpText: Post flair template IDs for this schedule. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_3_days.label: Flair Schedule 3: Allowed Days
flair_schedule_rule_3_days.helpText: Days when these flair templates are allowed.

flair_schedule_rule_4_ids.label: Flair Schedule 4: Template IDs
flair_schedule_rule_4_ids.helpText: Post flair template IDs for this schedule. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_4_days.label: Flair Schedule 4: Allowed Days
flair_schedule_rule_4_days.helpText: Days when these flair templates are allowed.

flair_schedule_rule_5_ids.label: Flair Schedule 5: Template IDs
flair_schedule_rule_5_ids.helpText: Post flair template IDs for this schedule. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_5_days.label: Flair Schedule 5: Allowed Days
flair_schedule_rule_5_days.helpText: Days when these flair templates are allowed.
